note: The stateful Stamina + Concentration economy (combat_v32_proposal §11.5/§11.6/§4.9 + derived_stats §4.2/§5.2). Boundary: M4a owns commit-depth cost / chain cap / wound ceiling / disengage cost / recovery formula; M6 owns the stateful pools, the full per-action drain (movement + sub-action + armour + per-exchange), the threshold bands for both resources, and the §11.6 dual-resource shape. Class A = canonical (derived_stats armour drain, -3/exchange Concentration, Out-of-Breath/Spent -2D). Class B = v32 draft drain costs + threshold fractions (sim-tunable). Composes M2 (maxima) + M4a (commit/disengage/recovery).

Concentration = Focus x3, range 3-21, -3 per exchange
Concentration Spent at 0: -2D all combat rolls; resets to max (canonical social-contest Regroup)
